title: Abel's Masks
description: Hide your identity or just have a cool style with this masks!
body:
You're on a roleplay server and you need to hide your identity to do some 'a bit not legal' stuff? You want to have a cool new style? Or maybe both? Now you can!

Crafting recipes

Mask Template (Any wool is supported)

Mask Builder

How works the Mask Builder?

Insert a mask template, select your preferred mask, click create and there you go!

Gamerules!

Do you want the mask to be purely cosmetic? only set HideMaskIdentity to false!
